steps.title: Identify the cause-and-effect signal
steps.content: The preceding sentence explains that the war made performance difficult. The next sentence shows what happened as a direct result: Amaya left Spain. The blank needs a transition word that expresses this consequence.

steps.title: Choose the transition that signals consequence
steps.content: ”As a result” directly expresses that her departure was a consequence of the wartime hardship. The other three establish contrast, sequencing, or illustration—none of which fit a causal outcome. That matches choice B — B is correct.
